properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v4 v7 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I think it's too soon to write this I'm still in the grip of the crisis If this is part of making me righteous I might just Need a little courage to fight this

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Honestly, I feel a little bit like Job Though I know he had it worse than me Through it all, You're making me golden Facing opposition everywhere I go Like somebody's cursing me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I'm afraid I lack the faith For the road ahead I try to follow You, but I don't know where You went

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I go to the East I go to the West And still, I'm not finding You In the North and the South I'm chasing You down Like somebody's hiding You I know You know the way I go and You won't leave me broken Through it all, You're making me golden

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So I'll stand up and face it I got a chance and I don't wanna waste it Sometimes, grace can be a little abrasive But if I embrace it, it'll sharpen up my dull places I'm trying not to focus on how cruel the universe can be I'm looking for a reason to believe I'm wrong Like somebody's cursing me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But I refuse to listen to All the voices in my head But instead, I keep praying the words that Job said

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When it hurts so bad When it all comes crashing down When we start from scratch See what we can live without In the end, I know It'll all be gold While I wait for that I don't look back
